action.proof_term:
constructor
  · intro hlim B
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := Filter.tendsto_atTop_atTop.mp hlim (B + 1)
    refine ⟨max N 2, ?_⟩
    intro n hn
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) hn
    have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_right _ _) hn
    have hB : B + 1 ≤
        ⨆ m : Fin n, ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + m - n := hN n hnN
    letI : Nonempty (Fin n) := Fin.pos_iff_nonempty.mp (by omega)
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ :
        ∃ m : Fin n,
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + m - n =
            ⨆ i : Fin n, ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 i + i - n :=
      exists_eq_ciSup_of_finite
    have hBm : B + 1 ≤
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + (m : ℕ) - n := by
      rw [hm]
      exact hB
    have hm0 : (m : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
      intro hmzero
      have hs0 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (0 : ℕ) = 0 := by native_decide
      rw [hmzero, hs0] at hBm
      omega
    let k := n - (m : ℕ)
    refine ⟨k, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · dsimp [k]
      omega
    · dsimp [k]
      omega
    · dsimp [k]
      have hm_lt : (m : ℕ) < n := m.isLt
      have hnkm : n - (n - (m : ℕ)) = (m : ℕ) := by omega
      rw [hnkm]
      omega
  · intro hshift
    rw [Filter.tendsto_atTop_atTop]
    intro B
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hshift B
    refine ⟨max N 1, ?_⟩
    intro n hn
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) hn
    obtain ⟨k, hk0, hkn, hkfail⟩ := hN n hnN
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - k, by omega⟩
    have hterm : B ≤
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + (m : ℕ) - n := by
      dsimp [m]
      omega
    have hbdd : BddAbove
        (Set.range fun i : Fin n ↦
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 i + (i : ℕ) - n) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨i, rfl⟩
      dsimp
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (i : ℕ)
      have hi : (i : ℕ) < n := i.isLt
      omega
    exact hterm.trans (le_ciSup hbdd m)

constructor
  · intro hlim B
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := Filter.tendsto_atTop_atTop.mp hlim (B + 1)
    refine ⟨max N 2, ?_⟩
    intro n hn
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) hn
    have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_right _ _) hn
    have hB : B + 1 ≤
        ⨆ m : Fin n, ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + m - n := hN n hnN
    letI : Nonempty (Fin n) := Fin.pos_iff_nonempty.mp (by omega)
    obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ :
        ∃ m : Fin n,
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + m - n =
            ⨆ i : Fin n, ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 i + i - n :=
      exists_eq_ciSup_of_finite
    have hBm : B + 1 ≤
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + (m : ℕ) - n := by
      rw [hm]
      exact hB
    have hm0 : (m : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
      intro hmzero
      have hs0 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (0 : ℕ) = 0 := by native_decide
      rw [hmzero, hs0] at hBm
      omega
    let k := n - (m : ℕ)
    refine ⟨k, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · dsimp [k]
      omega
    · dsimp [k]
      omega
    · dsimp [k]
      have hm_lt : (m : ℕ) < n := m.isLt
      have hnkm : n - (n - (m : ℕ)) = (m : ℕ) := by omega
      rw [hnkm]
      omega
  · intro hshift
    rw [Filter.tendsto_atTop_atTop]
    intro B
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hshift B
    refine ⟨max N 1, ?_⟩
    intro n hn
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) hn
    obtain ⟨k, hk0, hkn, hkfail⟩ := hN n hnN
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - k, by omega⟩
    have hterm : B ≤
        ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + (m : ℕ) - n := by
      dsimp [m]
      omega
    have hbdd : BddAbove
        (Set.range fun i : Fin n ↦
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 i + (i : ℕ) - n) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨i, rfl⟩
      dsimp
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (i : ℕ)
      have hi : (i : ℕ) < n := i.isLt
      omega
    exact hterm.trans (le_ciSup hbdd m)

info.lean_statement:
Filter.Tendsto
      (fun n ↦ ⨆ m : Fin n, ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m + m - n)
      Filter.atTop Filter.atTop ↔
      ∀ B : ℕ, ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, N ≤ n →
        ∃ k : ℕ, 0 < k ∧ k < n ∧ B + k <
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - k)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
